scripts.build: npm run build:sidecar && npm run tauri build
scripts.clean: bash -c 'lsof -ti :5959 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; rm -rf src-tauri/target/debug/build src-tauri/target/debug/deps src-tauri/target/debug/.fingerprint src-tauri/target/debug/github-review src-tauri/target/debug/github-review.d; echo "Killed servers on :5959 and cleaned build cache"'
